creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Close, submitter confirms that this is a duplicate of amd64/122473, and that 
the patch to ehci from that PR fixes the problem for him.  That patch 
is already in HEAD, RELENG_7 and RELENG_6, so this issue will be fixed in 
FreeBSD 7.1.
